data.body: PUSHED corrected stack to gerrit refs/for/main. Pre-flight GREEN: make lint + typecheck + all drift gates (docs-index/gen-cli/gen-mcp/gen-env) pass; make test 5635 passed / 1 failed (KNOWN pre-existing flake test_resolve_symbol_confirms_third_party_module - yaml stdlib classification, fails on clean main too, NOT my diff) / 16 skipped. Stack rebased onto origin/main 02d4da346 (conflict-free). All 8 changes got new patchsets; prior LLM-Review+1/Verified+1 cleared (will re-run). Changes: 558/560(ddbe/4e9d unchanged), 561(TS1 in-toto), 563(TS2 commit-ancestry), 576/579(264f/2f13 unchanged), 580(TS3 gate+ledger), 581(TS4 docs). NEXT: await CI Verified+1 + LLM-Review+1 per change; close tickets bottom-up (c96d->09f9->117b->b134) as each Verified+1 + completion-verifier PASS; re-run epic completion-verifier; submit top to land atomically. DO NOT submit until all green.
